name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
description: Kanbantic issue lifecycle skills: intake (report / request / propose), triage, prepare, execute, review — all artifacts via Kanbantic MCP. v2.5.0 adds /kanbantic-sync-workspace-skills (KBT-F265 / KBT-TRUL014): materializes the active workspace's Toolkit Skill / Command / Subagent items as on-disk `.claude/commands/*.md` and `.claude/agents/*.md` mirrors with a `.kanbantic-sync.json` manifest for drift detection. Companion to Kanbantic API change KBT-F264 (bootstrap_agent now also returns skills/commands/subagents/customs arrays). v2.4.2 patches lane-skill SKILL.md mechanical inconsistencies (KBT-B192 / KBT-RL064): adds the missing update_validation_status lifecycle hook (NotImplemented → Implemented in execute, Implemented → Validated in review) so linked user stories no longer stay stale after Done; repairs the broken /prepare-issue and /execute-issue slash-command references in kanbantic-issue-review; corrects the stale 'Review → Done' overview wording to the canonical 'Review → InDeployment' per KBT-RL053; ships a new lint-skills static-drift detector (forward direction, complementing v2.4.1's reverse-direction check-bundle-tool-drift) wired into npm test. v2.4.1 adds a real-proxy regression test + bundle ↔ live MCP-registry drift detector (KBT-B200). v2.4.0 introduces Phase-of-Features-of-Tasks Epic shape (KBT-F250). v2.3.0 introduced InDeployment (KBT-F236), v2.2.0 introduced Prepared (KBT-F235). See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.5.0.md.
